pitchEn: A camera-based awareness assistant that watches your sleeping or playing child through the phone camera and alerts you on motion: it flags stirring/waking, a second person appearing in the room, or the child leaving the frame. Detection runs on-device with a local notification, sound, and a photo log for each event.
newFeaturesEn: First release: on-device motion watching with child-aware alerts (stirring, stranger in room, left frame), local notifications, and an event log with snapshots.

dataHandling.notes: Video is processed on the device and never uploaded; event snapshots and logs stay local. Network is used only for a one-time free AI-model download and optionally a user-supplied camera/relay URL. In-app disclaimer states it is NOT a certified safety device.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account or login is required. On first launch pick a language, read the onboarding (including the safety disclaimer that it is not a certified baby monitor), and continue to Permissions. Grant Camera (and optionally Notifications), point the phone camera at a scene, and start the watcher; moving in front of the camera triggers a local alert and a logged snapshot. Everything runs on-device.
